calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-056 action-contrastive matched-entropy FP-2 falsifier (GAP-A, A_only; re-queue of 569b)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-569b which never actually executed. cloud-4 claimed 569b at 2026-05-29T21:11:24Z; ~65 seconds later cloud-4's ree-runner.service was systemctl-restarted (to pick up the new PHASE3_DISABLE_RUNNER_HEARTBEAT_WRITE=1 env var). systemd's cgroup-kill SIGTERM'd the experiment subprocess; Python exit 143; no sentinel; runner's ERROR-result branch removed 569b from queue and POST /queue/remove'd it. No manifest, no governance evidence. 569c is bit-identical: same script body (observation-anchored InfoNCE targets via rolling buffer, grad-clip 1.0, non-finite-loss skip), same 5 arms (ARM_0_OFF / ARM_1_W001 / ARM_2_W005 / ARM_3_W020 / ARM_4_MATCHED_NOISE), same acceptance criteria (C1 cand_world_pairwise_dist>0.05, C2 candidate first-action entropy>matched-noise, C3 selected-action entropy lift). claim_ids unchanged. New ID avoids the silent-skip-by-completed-list pattern on whatever worker still has 569b in its persisted runner_status.

items.title: MECH-295 drive->liking->approach cascade Tier-1 retest (re-queue of 490h post runner FAIL-branch fix)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-490h which ran to completion on ree-cloud-2 2026-05-29T20:11Z-21:46Z (elapsed 5662s; runner sentinel reported FAIL) but lost its manifest to the FAIL-branch silent-drop bug fixed at ree-v3 commit 41c3411 (2026-05-29T21:24Z UTC). Bit-identical script body; only the EXPERIMENT_TYPE / QUEUE_ID / SUPERSEDES constants and docstring change. The runner restart-induced REE_assembly git pull cycle clobbered the untracked manifest before it was pushed. See autopsy artifact REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490h-V3-EXQ-592b_2026-05-30.md. claim_ids unchanged from predecessor -- the science is identical; only the pipeline bug was the difference.

items.title: MECH-090 R-c commit-readiness gate validation (re-queue of 592b post runner FAIL-branch fix)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-592b which ran to completion on DLAPTOP-4.local 2026-05-29T07:23Z-08:32Z (elapsed 4163s; runner sentinel ARM_0=0/3 ARM_1=0/3 joint-FAIL) but lost its manifest to the FAIL-branch silent-drop bug fixed at ree-v3 commit 41c3411 (2026-05-29T21:24Z UTC). The runner.log shows the script's 'Evidence written -> ...v3_exq_592b...20260529T083239Z_v3.json' line but the subsequent runner-restart-induced REE_assembly autostash + recovery cycle clobbered the untracked manifest before report_result was called. See autopsy artifact REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490h-V3-EXQ-592b_2026-05-30.md. claim_ids unchanged from predecessor -- the science (R-c falsifier-grade 2-arm diagnostic on the MECH-090 commit-entry readiness conjunction substrate) is identical; only the pipeline bug was the difference.
